business.headline: Air India CEO Campbell Wilson resigns, board begins search for successor: ReportThe leadership change had been in motion for some time. The search for a successor reportedly began earlier this year after Wilson indicated he did not wish to continue beyond his contract period. He had taken charge in September 2022, shortly after the airline returned to the Tata Group following privatisation.

DA hike delay: Is this normal or something to worry about?For many, a DA hike around this time is almost expected. But with no announcement yet, the delay is raising a simple question, i.e., is this normal, or is something different this time?

Nayara to shut Vadinar refinery from April 9; will fuel supply take a hit?The timing of this shutdown is important. Ongoing tensions in the Middle East, including the US-Iran conflict, have already tightened the availability of oil and gas globally. This has put pressure on imports of crude oil, natural gas and LPG into India.

Asset allocation should be determined based on the required rate of return and an individual's risk profile.

The global oil crisis is worsening. How badly is it being underestimated?Crude oil prices are rising, supply is tightening, and the West Asia war shows no sign of ending. So how much of this oil crisis is the world still underestimating?

entertainment.headline: Dhurandhar 2 box office: Unstoppable at Rs 1,600 crore, more records in sight Dhurandhar: The Revenge continues its strong box office run, holding steady on its third Monday. The Ranveer Singh-led film has crossed Rs 1,600 crore worldwide.

It is not just about numbers anymore, it's about changing Bollywood's game.

Having won the toss, KKR opted to bat first in a bizarre call and were made to pay as they were reeling at 25 for 2 in 3.4 overs. Rain was relentless for a good portion of the night and despite relenting at the end, the match had to be called off. Both teams get one point each in the end.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna.
